title: palaquium oblongifolium
intro: Palaquium oblongifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, commonly known as a type of sapote tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Palaquium oblongifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
